gist.headline: Daily README Refresh

gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a new pixelated note to a wooden bulletin board. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
